title: acinos majoranifolius subsp. elatior
intro: Acinos majoranifolius subsp. elatior, also known as Elatior Acinos, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Elatior Acinos include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Elatior Acinos can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
